description: Perform a flood peak attenuation analysis on the Muncie unsteady flow simulation using the HDF5 results ('Muncie.p04.hdf'). Extract flow hydrographs for the most upstream and most downstream cross-sections to compute the peak flow at both locations (cfs), peak attenuation (cfs and %), peak timing lag (hours), and cumulative flood volumes (acre-ft) with volume difference (%). Save the analysis results to /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/ including 'flood_attenuation_data.csv' with columns [Time_hours, Flow_Upstream_cfs, Flow_Downstream_cfs], a report named 'flood_attenuation_summary.txt' listing all computed metrics, and an image named 'flood_attenuation_plot.png' showing the overlaid hydrographs.
